description_long: This house is a large, modern multi-unit residential structure with a flat roof and a geometric, modular design. The exterior features a mix of light gray, white, and beige wall panels, with extensive use of glass for windows and doors, providing ample natural light. There are multiple levels, including a prominent tower-like section and several recessed and protruding volumes, creating visual interest and functional outdoor spaces. The property includes a fenced-in yard with green lawn areas and a paved driveway, as well as a central courtyard with a pool or water feature. The windows are arranged in vertical strips and asymmetrical patterns, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic. The main entryway is understated, with a simple door, minimal steps, and no elaborate porch or columns.
description: A large, modern multi-story house with flat roofs, geometric forms, and a mix of glass and neutral wall panels. Features include a tower section, fenced yard, driveway, and asymmetrical window arrangements.
description_view_0: This view highlights the side of the house with a visible pool or water feature, multiple window strips, and a fenced yard.
description_view_1: This view shows the rear or garden side, featuring a large green lawn, extensive windows, and the central courtyard area.
description_view_2: This view emphasizes the long, flat-roofed side with minimal windows and a prominent tower structure at one end.
description_view_3: This view presents the front facade with the driveway, garage door, main entryway, and a mix of green and paved areas.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement, vertical strips, large glass panels
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with minimal steps, no porch or columns, integrated into the facade
